inline_comments.message: in SO, so/charts/so-openstack-adapter/values.yaml:  openStackEncryptedPasswordHere: "c124921a3a0efbe579782cde8227681e" seems like they are not using "enc:.." format...

Yes. The fix here uses the EncryptionTool class already present in APPC code which is just Base64 encoding rather than encryption. SO uses a class called CryptoUtils which encrypts with a hardcoded key.
Would it be a better solution to copy the CryptoUtils class from the SO project into APPC and use the same encryption key as SO uses? Encoding is not really encryption but the encryption key is going to be visible in ONAP repository as it is open-source so it is not secure either.
